texto: Everybody starts the journey but not everybody completes it
autor: and even those who reach the destined point reach there in different forms and they form different destinies. Be careful as you journey in life!
explicacao: Citação de and even those who reach the destined point reach there in different forms and they form different destinies. Be careful as you journey in life! sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Everybody starts the journey but not everybody completes it” articula reflexao, ernest-agyemang-yeboah, everybody em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e reflexao.
